event.message:
PENTHOUSE GROOVE "Prisoner of Groove" DJ Party🎉! 

📅 日時: 2026/05/01 (金) 18:00〜
📍 会場: como es（福岡県福岡市中央区今泉2丁目1−75）
🎧 DJ: Seiji Shirouzu / KAZUNE / GINGALAXY
🍸 Music Charge ¥1,000 / + 1 Drink Order

何かと物騒なニュースも絶えない昨今ですが、PENTHOUSE GROOVEは"Prisoner of Groove" DJ Partyと称して奇しくもメーデーにあたる5/1にスペシャルDJパーティーを開催します。

今回は como es 様に会場としてご協力いただき、新たな場所での開催となります。

また前回のイベントにてご好評いただいたアメカジシリーズ第二弾として、本格アメカジTシャツ「"Prisoner of Groove" T-shirt 」も当日限定で発売予定です。

そのほか、来場者の皆様にはちょっとしたサプライズもあるかもしれません。

変わり続けるPENTHOUSE GROOVEを是非体感しに来てください。


🌐 詳しくはウェブサイトをチェック！
カウントダウンもスタート中！
👉 https://penthousegroove.com

📩 ご質問はDMまたはメールにてお気軽に
📧 penth.groove@gmail.com



PENTHOUSE GROOVE “Prisoner of Groove” DJ Party🎉!

📅 Date: Friday, May 1, 2026, 18:00–
📍 Venue: como es (2-1-75 Imaizumi, Chuo-ku, Fukuoka, Japan)
🎧 DJs: Seiji Shirouzu / KAZUNE / GINGALAXY
🍸 Music Charge: ¥1,000 / + 1 Drink Order

With so many unsettling news stories around these days, PENTHOUSE GROOVE will be holding a special DJ party titled “Prisoner of Groove” on May 1, which also happens to fall on May Day.

This time, thanks to the support of como es as our venue, the event will be held in a new location.

In addition, as the second release in our Americana-inspired series that was well received at the previous event, our authentic Americana-style T-shirt, the “Prisoner of Groove” T-shirt, will also be available for one day only at the event.

There may also be a little surprise for our guests as well.

Come and experience the ever-evolving PENTHOUSE GROOVE for yourself.

🌐 Check the website for details!
The countdown has already started!
👉 https://penthousegroove.com

📩 Feel free to contact us via DM or email if you have any questions.
📧 penth.groove@gmail.com

youtube.title:
PENTHOUSE GROOVE NEW DJ VIDEO🎧
【on the street in concrete jungle】

jazz funk.rare groove.acid jazz

This time, we're sharing a transition scene from "Homesick – The Last Poets" into "Jungle Groove – The Jungle Band".

Please enjoy the groove unique to analog, which is a combination of songs by top musicians who play precise rhythms.

今回は「HOMESICK - THE LAST POETS」から「Jungle Groove · The Jungle Band」への繋ぎのシーンをお届け。
正確なリズムを刻む最高峰のミュージシャンの楽曲を掛け合わせたアナログならではのグルーヴをお楽しみください。

Listen To MyTube!
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GQq7p8pyv2E
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

The "PENTHOUSE GROOVE "PRISONER OF GROOVE" T-shirt" commemorating the event on 2026/05/01 was released only on that day, but due to popular demand, it will be released in limited quantities online.
Please check it out once if you like.

recommend.message:
Today's Recommend:
Praça da Alegria – Marcos Resende & Index

しなやかに走るブラジリアン・ジャズファンクのグルーヴと、軽やかに広がる鍵盤の高揚感。
70sフュージョンの熱とブラジルらしい抜けの良さが、じわっとフロアを温める一曲。

A nimble groove of Brazilian jazz funk, bright keys rise.
A track that gently warms the floor with fusion heat.

break.message:
TAKE A BREAK vol.8 を更新

Updated TAKE A BREAK vol.8.



🎧 TAKE A BREAK Vol.8 – Analog Vibes from Bali

一杯のコーヒーの奥にある、遠い土地の土や雨や日差し。

バリのガムランにある、人と人の呼吸から生まれる独特のグルーヴ。

TAKE A BREAK vol.8では、コーヒー、バリ、ガムラン、Group Of Godsを通して、現代のスピードから少し離れるための“アナログな感動”について書いてみました。

ちょっと一息、のお供に是非。



🔗 WebSite

https://penthousegroove.com/takeabreak.html



📝 note別編集版

https://note.com/penthousegroove/n/nb9bafafa41b6


🎧 TAKE A BREAK Vol.8 – Analog Vibes from Bali

A cup of coffee carries traces of distant soil, rain, sunlight, and human hands.

Balinese gamelan carries a groove born from breath, timing, and subtle human movement.

In TAKE A BREAK vol.8, I wrote about coffee, Bali, gamelan, Group Of Gods, and the analog feeling that lets us step away from the speed of modern life.

Perfect for a little break.



🔗 WebSite

https://penthousegroove.com/takeabreak.html



📝 Alternate edit on note

https://note.com/penthousegroove/n/nb9bafafa41b6
